training_graph_implication: If placed on the train side, positive herbs provide supervision and context-only members may remain as train-side context; nodes, labels, and features remain distinct.
validation_graph_implication: If placed on validation, every group herb and every incident herb-context edge is excluded from the training graph; only validation labels support model selection.
test_graph_implication: If placed on test, every group herb and every incident herb-context edge is excluded from training; labels were originally transferred to a sealed payload and never tuned the model; in v1.2 they are public but remain ineligible for tuning.
